description: Permission control signal sent by the eligible party to a certain region connector. The 'action' field discriminates the payload.

oneOf.description: Adjusts the transmission schedule for a permission.

permissionId.description: Unique ID of the permission this signal applies to

transmissionSchedule.description: Cron expression; effective schedule is capped at the data-need frequency

oneOf.description: Enables or disables transmission for a permission.

permissionId.description: Unique ID of the permission this signal applies to

enabled.description: Whether transmission is enabled for the permission

oneOf.description: Terminates a permission, causing the region connector to stop transmitting data for it and clean up any associated resources.

permissionId.description: Unique ID of the permission this signal applies to
